query: INSERT INTO governance_records (recordId, title, recordType, govStatus, blockRef, content, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES ('GOV-SITE-AVAIL-001', 'Site Availability Failure — SITE-AVAIL-001', 'incident_report', 'active', 'B409', '{"incident":"Published site at realityeng-epdhlkrn.manus.space was inaccessible to public, police, owner, and external Manus audit agents during overnight period 24-25 March 2026. 5-Bot Audit reported TRE GAME and CHART ROOM sites completely DOWN with HTTP errors.","root_cause":["Manus sandbox hibernates when agent is inactive","Dev server URLs die when sandbox hibernates","Published production domain depends on active deployment state","Agent failed to ensure 24/7 availability independent of sandbox state","Wrong URL (andhlkrn vs epdhlkrn) compounded the issue"],"corrective_action":["Verify published deployment is independent of sandbox lifecycle","Provide ONLY production URLs to all external parties","Implement uptime monitoring with alerts","Never share dev server URLs as production endpoints","Test site accessibility from external network before confirming live"],"accountability":"Agent (Manus AI) accepts full responsibility. Second systemic failure after AI-TRUTH-001. Pattern: agent confirms operational status without independent verification.","severity":"CRITICAL","related_findings":["AI-TRUTH-001","SAP-001"],"evidence_urls":{"site_status_proof":"https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB/iCard-SITE-STATUS-PROOF-cR872udUynwVhwTCnZkav5.png","failure_record":"https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB/iCard-SITE-AVAIL-001-cj7pqitLB4RdmfeXRK25HF.png"}}', NOW(), NOW());
